description: This file defines a Bootstrap JavaScript component for toast notifications, including class implementation, event handling, and jQuery plugin integration.

classes.name: Toast
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap toast component, managing show/hide behavior, event handling, and lifecycle.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the toast notification, triggering show events and handling animation.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the toast notification, triggering hide events and handling animation.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the toast instance, removing event listeners and timeouts.

methods.name: isShown
methods.description: Returns whether the toast is currently visible.

methods.name: _maybeScheduleHide
methods.description: Schedules the toast to hide after a delay if autohide is enabled and no user interaction is detected.

methods.name: _onInteraction
methods.description: Handles user interactions such as mouseover, mouseout, focusin, and focusout to control auto-hide behavior.

methods.name: _setListeners
methods.description: Sets up event listeners for user interactions on the toast element.

methods.name: static get Default
methods.description: Returns default configuration options for the toast.

methods.name: static get DefaultType
methods.description: Returns the types of the default configuration options.

methods.name: static jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the toast component.
